name: @luma/androidtv
description: LUMA Android TV client WebView shell over @luma/tv + native media3/ExoPlayer engine.

scripts.build: tsgo --noEmit && vite build && bun run sync:android
scripts.sync:android: rm -rf android/app/src/main/assets/luma && mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets/luma && cp -R dist/. android/app/src/main/assets/luma/
scripts.package: echo 'Run: bun run build:androidtv, then: cd clients/androidtv/android && ./gradlew assembleRelease'
